name: bug-localization
description: Three-step bug localization: reproduce, isolate, fix. Prevents 'fix' that masks the symptom without addressing the cause.
steps: Reproduce the bug with a minimal test case
Add logging/assertions to narrow down where the unexpected behavior starts
Trace the data flow backward from the symptom to the root cause
Write a test that fails because of the root cause (not the symptom)
Fix the root cause with the smallest possible change
Verify the original reproduction case passes and no regressions were introduced
